steps.title: Locate the 4th growing season on the horizontal axis
steps.content:
The horizontal axis represents the growing season number. Find the value 4 on this axis.
Draw a vertical line up from 4 to meet the scatterplot.

steps.title: Read the corresponding weight from the scatterplot
steps.content:
The point where the vertical line meets the data lies on the horizontal grid line at 40 pounds.
Thus the weight for the 4th season is 40 pounds.

steps.title: Round and match the answer choice
steps.content:
The weight is already an integer, so rounding to the nearest pound gives 40.
The answer is 40.
